subcodes.first_line: the servant in attendance hath appeared with thy letter and presented it before the Throne, and this wondrous Tablet hath been sent down unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتابک و عرضه تلقاء العرش و نزل لک هذا اللوح البدیع انا
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
